    California Senior Living Facilities & Care Homes

    184 senior living communities in California. Pick your region - each color on the map is one region - and browse its communities city by city.

    What's available in California

    • Assisted Living - 158
    • Memory Care - 141
    • Independent Living - 106
    • Skilled Nursing - 41
    • CCRC / Life Plan - 32
    • Respite Care - 20

    How California regulates senior care

    Assisted living and residential care homes are licensed as RCFEs by the Community Care Licensing Division; skilled nursing facilities are certified by CMS and licensed by the California Department of Public Health. Lookup: California Department of Social Services, Community Care Licensing Division.

    California money questions

    • What senior living costs in California
    • Does California Medicaid pay for senior care?

    Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families, and the resident's quality of life comes first here - then the family, then the facility. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice - for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Listings are never paid placements. Last data review: 2026-07-11. Run a senior living community? Claim your free listing or see our marketing services for communities. Terms · Privacy.
